g.text: * Do this next: Commit a first-draft convention file. 30 lines from your best-AI-output senior engineer.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: ** Do this next: Measure one recurring workflow for a sprint. Real numbers (hours, cleanup, PRs).

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: *** Do this next: Find the highest-leverage workflow that isn't yet AI-augmented. Ship it.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: **** Do this next: You need architectural judgment, not another rollout. Find someone who has shipped this at your scale.
